feature_spec: A focus timer feature for the AskFin app. Users can set a study focus timer before starting a learning session. Includes: FocusTimerView (SwiftUI view with circular countdown ring, start/pause/reset buttons, elapsed time display), FocusTimerViewModel (ObservableObject with Published properties for timeRemaining, isRunning, isPaused. Timer logic using Timer.publish. Methods: start(), pause(), reset(), formatTime(). Default 25 minutes.), FocusTimerService (protocol FocusTimerServiceProtocol with saveFocusSession(duration:completedAt:) and getFocusHistory() -> [FocusSession]. Implementation using UserDefaults. FocusSession struct with id UUID, duration TimeInterval, completedAt Date, isCompleted Bool.)
compile_contract: Every Swift file MUST start with the correct import (import SwiftUI for Views, import Foundation for models/services, import Combine for ObservableObject/Published). NEVER use ... or placeholder code. Every method body must contain real compilable Swift. Each type in exactly ONE file. All files must pass swiftc -parse.
